title: Nyan Cat
description: A port of the old Nyan Cat mod.
body:
This mod is a port of the infamous mod that adds Nyan Cat, Tac Nayn and things like music discs to the game, and is known to appear in early 2010s, which is now lost. [Reference](https://web.archive.org/web/20180819122915/https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1276514-1-0-0-nyan-cats-v2-1) I didn't put too much effort into this mod, so bugs might be present. Feel free to create an issue in the repository. Extra feature that the mod adds apart from the original: Cats will spawn blocks that can either be mined to get waffles and pop tarts.
Credits @tixork or whoever that had the idea of porting this mod.
